summary: Safety-Aware Routing Feature: Complete testing of POST /api/safe-route endpoint with all 4 modes (fastest, safest, balanced, night_guardian). Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login and dashboard working correctly with SSE Live indicator.

backend_api.POST /api/safe-route balanced mode: PASS - Returns 3 routes with recommendation, mode_weights: {time: 0.5, safety: 0.5}
backend_api.POST /api/safe-route safest mode: PASS - Recommends safest route (lowest risk), mode_weights: {time: 0.2, safety: 0.8}
backend_api.POST /api/safe-route fastest mode: PASS - Recommends fastest route (lowest time), mode_weights: {time: 0.8, safety: 0.2}
backend_api.POST /api/safe-route night_guardian at 2: PASS - 80/20 safety/time weighting, higher risk scores (1.7x multiplier), environmental factors detected (deserted_area, late_night, low_lighting)
backend_api.POST /api/safe-route invalid mode: PASS - Returns 400 error with helpful message
backend_api.Segment color coding: PASS - Segments have valid hex colors (#22c55e green, #f59e0b yellow, #ef4444 red)
backend_api.Segment risk breakdown: PASS - Each segment has live_risk, forecast_risk, environmental fields
backend_api.mode_weights in response: PASS - Response includes mode_weights with time and safety percentages
backend_api.recommended flag: PASS - Exactly one route has recommended=true, matches mode selection
backend_api.time parameter: PASS - time='23:30' activates night_guardian mode automatically
backend_api.GET /api/system/forecast-cache-status: PASS - Returns cache monitoring data (redis_keys, memory_entries, ttl_seconds, grid_cell_size_m)
backend_api.SOS cache invalidation: PASS - SOS trigger invalidates forecast cache for grid cell (cache entries decreased from 46 to 45)
backend_api.Authentication: PASS - Requires auth, operators and guardians can access

frontend_ui.login_page_loads: PASS - Nagarik branding, Family/Operator tabs, login form visible
frontend_ui.dashboard_overview: PASS - Shows stats (Seniors, Devices, Active Incidents, Critical, Online, Offline)
frontend_ui.system_status: PASS - Monitoring Service, Incident Detection, Device Sync all Active
frontend_ui.sse_live_status: PASS - 'Live' indicator visible showing SSE connected
frontend_ui.navigation: PASS - All nav items working (Overview, Safety Monitor, Safety Score, Incidents, Seniors, Settings)

critical_code_review_comments: Safety-Aware Routing correctly implements: Route Safety Score = 0.5 * live_risk + 0.3 * forecast_risk + 0.2 * environmental
Night Guardian auto-activates at night (22:00-06:00) when mode is balanced/safest, with 1.4x (night) or 1.7x (late_night) multiplier
Environmental factors (low_lighting, deserted_area, late_night, low_crowd) only appear during non-day hours
OSRM self-hosted routing working correctly with fallback to public OSRM
Forecast cache uses grid-based cells (~250m resolution) with 30-min TTL
SOS triggers correctly invalidate forecast cache for affected grid cell
In-memory fallback active for Redis (Redis not running in preview env)
seed_data_creation: One test SOS trigger created and cancelled for cache invalidation test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safety-Aware Routing feature fully tested. All 4 modes (fastest/safest/balanced/night_guardian) verified. Key behaviors: (1) Night Guardian auto-activates at night for balanced/safest modes, (2) Environmental factors appear only during non-day hours, (3) Segment scoring uses 50% live + 30% forecast + 20% environmental, (4) Mode weights control route recommendation, (5) Forecast cache invalidates on SOS trigger. Redis not running - in-memory fallback active. OSRM is self-hosted at localhost:5000.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running in preview env - in-memory cache fallback active for forecast and rate limiting
OSRM creates synthetic route variants when fewer than 3 alternatives returned from self-hosted server

night_guardian.auto_activation: Activates when time is night/late_night even if mode is balanced/safest

segment_scoring_formula: Route Safety Score = 0.5 * live_risk + 0.3 * forecast_risk + 0.2 * environmental_factors

forecast_cache.sos_invalidation: Verified - cache entries decrease when SOS triggered at location
